Our Story

A Scent
That Speaks

Complete Sensation was born from a belief that fragrance is identity — a second skin, a wordless statement, an olfactory signature that precedes you and lingers after you've left.

We craft each scent with one purpose: to make you impossible to forget. From the ocean-cool serenity of Chill to the blazing warmth of Fire, every bottle carries a world.

How to Wear

The Art of
Wearing CS

01
🛁
Start Fresh
Apply to clean, moisturized skin right after a shower. Hydrated skin holds fragrance significantly longer and allows the top notes to bloom fully.
02
🎯
Target Pulse Points
Spray on wrists, neck, behind the ears, and the inner elbows. These warm areas diffuse your fragrance naturally as you move throughout the day.
03
🚫
Never Rub
Avoid rubbing your wrists together after applying. Friction breaks down fragrance molecules, dulling the top notes and shortening the life of your scent.
04
✨
Layer for Depth
Combine CS fragrances for a personal signature. Try COLD over VIBE for a fresh-bold contrast, or SOUL under GODX for warm, luxurious depth.

Our Purpose
M
🎯
Mission

What We
Set Out to Do

To craft affordable, high-quality fragrances that empower every Filipino to experience the confidence and artistry of fine perfumery — without compromise. We believe that scent is not a luxury, it is a right. Every CS bottle is a promise: that quality, creativity, and identity belong to everyone.

Accessibility
Quality
Identity
V
🔭
Vision

Where We
Are Going

To become the defining fragrance brand of Southeast Asia — a house whose name is synonymous with boldness, authenticity, and complete sensory experience. We envision a world where CS is the first bottle on every shelf, worn by those who refuse to be forgotten, celebrated by those who dare to leave a mark.

Global Reach
SE Asia Pride
Innovation
⚗️
Craftsmanship
Every note, deliberate
🌿
Integrity
Honest ingredients, honest price
🔥
Boldness
Never bland, always memorable
🤝
Community
Built by Filipinos, for everyone
♻️
Responsibility
Mindful of our footprint
Got Questions?

Frequently
Asked

Everything you need to know about CS fragrances, shipping, and how to get the most from your bottle.

Still can't find your answer?
Send us a message →

Yes — all CS fragrances are formulated as Eau de Parfum (EDP), with fragrance concentration ranging from 15–20%. This gives them excellent longevity of 6–10 hours on skin, and they project meaningfully without being overwhelming. Every bottle is sealed, lab-tested, and produced in an ISO-certified facility.
Most CS fragrances last between 6 to 10 hours depending on your skin type, climate, and application method. Oilier skin naturally holds scent longer. For maximum longevity, apply to pulse points on moisturized skin, and consider layering with an unscented lotion as a base before spraying.
Yes! We ship to all provinces across the Philippines via J&T Express, LBC, and Ninja Van. Metro Manila deliveries typically arrive in 1–3 business days. Provincial deliveries take 3–7 business days. Free shipping is available on orders ₱2,000 and above. We also offer same-day delivery in select Metro Manila areas via GrabExpress.
We accept returns and exchanges within 7 days of delivery for unopened, sealed products only. If you received a defective or damaged item, we will replace it free of charge within 14 days — just send us a photo of the damage. Note: opened bottles cannot be returned due to hygiene regulations, so we encourage sampling before committing to full bottles when possible.
Store your fragrance in a cool, dry place away from direct sunlight and heat sources. Avoid keeping perfume in the bathroom — the humidity and temperature changes degrade the scent over time. A bedroom shelf, drawer, or the original box is ideal. Stored properly, CS fragrances maintain their quality for 3–5 years.
All CS fragrances are cruelty-free — we do not test on animals. Our formulas comply with IFRA (International Fragrance Association) safety standards. For those with sensitive skin, we recommend patch-testing on the inner wrist before full application. If you have known fragrance allergies, please consult the ingredient list or contact us for the full MSDS sheet of any product.
Yes! We have an active reseller program open to individuals and business owners. Minimum order of 6 bottles qualifies for wholesale pricing, with discounts of 20–35% depending on volume. Contact us at resellers@completesensation.ph or use the contact form below and select "Wholesale Inquiry" as your subject. We typically respond within 24 hours.
For our warm, humid climate, lighter aquatic and citrus-based scents work beautifully. CS Chill (aquatic/fresh) and CS Blue (marine/lavender) are fan favorites for daily wear. CS Mono is excellent for air-conditioned office environments. For evenings or events, CS Rave, CS Fire, and CS GodX project beautifully in cooler settings. Our guide section has more tips on scent layering.
